title: Traun, Upper Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Traun, Upper Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Traun is a city in Upper Austria with a population of 24,000. A growing city in Upper Austria near Linz, known for its green spaces, the Traun River waterfront, and its strategic location in the Linz-Wels industrial region.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
